_comment: Korean GitHub owners (users/orgs) whose repos should appear in the korean-opensource category even when descriptions are English-only. Add new entries here — fetch.py picks them up on the next run; no code change needed. Use the GitHub login exactly (case-sensitive).
_usage: fetch.py adds `user:<login> pushed:>CUTOFF` queries for each entry into the korean-opensource category. lib/sort.ts also imports this list so repos surfaced in other categories get a Korean-owner bonus in the UI ranking.

owners.note: bkit Vibecoding Kit — PDCA + Claude Code (WVB)
